description.from:
## Intent
Restore conversation history visibility for procedure runs in dashboard conversation viewer when generated model helpers are missing from the Amplify client.

## Scope
- Harden  query path with GraphQL fallback for chat sessions/messages by .
- Guard subscription setup when model  helpers are unavailable.
- Preserve existing rendering/filtering behavior.

## Definition of Done
- Opening a procedure run no longer throws on undefined  / .
- Existing history loads via fallback and renders in UI.
- No regression for environments where generated model helpers exist.
- Tests added/updated for fallback behavior where practical.
description.to:
## Intent
Restore conversation history visibility for procedure runs in dashboard conversation viewer when generated model helpers are missing from the Amplify client.

## Scope
- Harden `conversation-viewer.tsx` query path with GraphQL fallback for chat sessions/messages by `procedureId`.
- Guard subscription setup when model `onCreate` helpers are unavailable.
- Preserve existing rendering/filtering behavior.

## Definition of Done
- Opening a procedure run no longer throws on undefined `listChatSessionByProcedureIdAndCreatedAt` / `onCreate`.
- Existing history loads via fallback and renders in UI.
- No regression for environments where generated model helpers exist.
- Tests added/updated for fallback behavior where practical.
